title: [release-1.3] Freeze the fedora-minimal image reference at Fedora 38
body:
... because the tests are assuming a v2s2 image, but as of Fedora 39, the image uses the OCI format.

This should fix failing tests. Originally from #2280 , thanks to a backport in #2293 by Tom.

comments.body: (Merging without review to silence noisy CI automation.)
I'm late to the party, but LGTM
